headline: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) Stock Could Be 17% Undervalued After Oil Prices Fell
summary: Why Lower Oil Prices Matter for Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Stock Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) has moved into focus after a U.S. Iran peace agreement sent oil prices lower, easing a key cost headwind for cruise operators as the busy summer booking period ramps up. See our latest analysis for Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings. The drop in fuel prices has arrived on top of a sharp 30 day share price return of 38.20% for Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings.
